host_screen.container: w-full max-w-7xl mx-auto p-12 min-h-screen flex flex-col justify-center
host_screen.question_text: text-[4vw] lg:text-[5vw] leading-tight text-center max-w-5xl mx-auto mb-16 font-black font-heading
host_screen.answer_card: h-32 flex items-center justify-start px-8 rounded-2xl text-3xl font-bold border-4 relative overflow-hidden
host_screen.timer_bar: w-full h-4 rounded-full mt-12 bg-white/10 overflow-hidden

player_mobile.container: w-full min-h-[100svh] flex flex-col p-4 bg-[#05050A]
player_mobile.answer_button: w-full h-24 sm:h-32 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center active:scale-95 transition-transform shadow-[0_4px_0_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)] active:shadow-[0_0px_0_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)] active:translate-y-1

lobby.side_a: flex-1 flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-cyan-950/30 border-r border-cyan-500/30
lobby.side_b: flex-1 flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-pink-950/30 border-l border-pink-500/30

buttons.primary: bg-white text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-widest rounded-full px-8 py-4 hover:scale-105 transition-transform

confetti.usage: Trigger on podium screen reveal. Shoot from bottom corners. Use cyan and pink brand colors.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over answer colors is either black or white depending on APCA contrast. For instance, black text on the Yellow Circle.
accessibility.colorblind_safe: Rely strictly on the combined identity of Color + Shape. The player phone screen should show huge centralized icons of the shapes if text is omitted.
accessibility.test_ids: Include data-testid on all interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='join-game-btn', data-testid='answer-btn-triangle').

hero_background.description: Abstract purple and pink gradient waves, use as a subtle low-opacity background for the landing page.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required icon library (e.g., lucide-react) for the answer shapes: Triangle, Diamond, Circle, Square.
Install 'framer-motion' to handle smooth animated transitions between the 4 game loop phases (Preview, Active, Reveal, Leaderboard) and leaderboard rank shifting.
Implement the Dual-Context architecture. Ensure you have clear routing or layout divergence for `/host` and `/player`.
Host view must not require scrolling (100vh locked) and should use responsive typography (e.g., text-[4vw]) to guarantee it fits across different TV/Laptop aspect ratios.
Player view must be locked to 100svh (mobile viewport safe) to prevent accidental scrolling when mashing answer buttons.
Ensure all buttons have robust active/press states (e.g., translate-y-1 to mimic a physical button press) for tactile feedback.
